message:
feat(tui): enhance lane view with health indicators, type icons, and dependency tags

Improve the lane-based issue dashboard visualization:

- Replace simple > marker with filled triangle for active lane
- Add lane health indicators showing blocked count or clear/empty status
- Increase issue preview limit from 6 to 8 per lane
- Show type icon alongside status icon for each issue
- Add blocker/blocked indicator tags displaying dependency relationships
- Improve priority and ID formatting with better spacing and truncation
- Update all 17 snapshot tests to reflect the new rendering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
